raw_consumer_statement:
Sears Mastercard by Citibank. 

XX/XX/year> : {$79.00} charge from XXXX annual account. I disputed the transaction for the second year in a row and the credit card company requested backup. As I do not have an account with XXXX I could provide no backup. As a result, the credit card company charged me for the transaction even though I told them via phone and on the computer that I don't even have an account with XXXX nor their parent company, XXXX.
